headline: I Can’t Stop Buying Alphabet Because The AI Talent Narrative is Wrong
summary: Every headline says Google is hemorrhaging its best AI minds to Anthropic and OpenAI, and that narrative has created one of the most exploitable gaps between fear and reality in the market right now.

raw.headline: I Can’t Stop Buying Alphabet Because The AI Talent Narrative is Wrong
raw.summary: Every headline says Google is hemorrhaging its best AI minds to Anthropic and OpenAI, and that narrative has created one of the most exploitable gaps between fear and reality in the market right now.

headline: Can Nebius Group Really 10X by 2030? The Math Says Yes
summary: Wolfe Research has a number that should stop any serious investor cold, and Nebius Group's own internal projections are not far behind. The question is whether one company can actually build the AI infrastructure layer the entire industry needs before the window closes.
